_doc: REFERENCE: Complete RainViewer radar integration via executable schema v2. Updated for 2026 API changes.
description: Global composite radar from 100+ countries. 2h history at 10-min intervals. Free, no API key. Nowcast discontinued Jan 2026.

rateLimit.note: 100 req/min per IP (since Jan 2026). Personal/educational use only.

manifestParsing._doc: RainViewer v5 manifest format. host + path combine to form tile URL base.

tileUrlParts._doc: How to build the final tile URL from manifest data.
tileUrlParts.z: Zoom level 0-7 (max 7 since Jan 2026, was 12 before)
tileUrlParts.color: Color scheme ID. Only 2 (Universal Blue) available since Jan 2026.

_color_schemes_deprecated._doc: These color schemes were discontinued January 1, 2026

api_changes_2026.nowcast_removed: radar.future array is now always empty. Nowcast/forecast radar data discontinued.
api_changes_2026.satellite_removed: Satellite infrared imagery no longer available.
api_changes_2026.color_schemes_reduced: Only Universal Blue (scheme 2) remains. 8 schemes removed.
api_changes_2026.commercial_use: No longer available for commercial use under free tier.

coverageMap._doc: Coverage maps show where radar data exists (transparent = data available, opaque = no coverage).
coverageMap.urlPattern: Same as tile URL with coverage-specific path from manifest

license: Free for personal and educational use. Must attribute 'Rain Viewer API' with link to rainviewer.com.
